title: Five Little Peppers in Trouble
actors: Edith Fellows, Dorothy Anne Seese, Dorothy Peterson
plot: The Peppers--widowed Mrs. Pepper and her five children Ben, Polly, Joey, Davie, and Phronsie--have returned to live in their small house in Gusty Corners with J.H. "Grandpa" King, his grandson Jasper, and their faithful butler Mar...
